summary: Completed comprehensive testing of MongoDB to PostgreSQL migration for Ri'DN Partner Dashboard. All 22 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend login and dashboard rendering verified working correctly. All CRUD operations for outlets, services, bookings, transactions, slot configs, and dashboard configs are functional.

issues: Dashboard shows test dashboard config (TEST_Dashboard_7aef6a) with only 1 widget showing 'Total Outlets: 0' instead of default dashboard with all widgets - this is due to test data created by previous testing, not a bug

critical_code_review_comments: PostgreSQL migration successfully completed - all SQLAlchemy models working correctly
All 40+ database tables created and functional
Authentication (register, login, get current user) working with JWT tokens
CRUD operations for outlets, services, bookings verified with data persistence
Transactions correctly linked to bookings with commission calculations
Slot configuration with embed tokens for public booking pages working
Dashboard configuration with customizable widgets functional
Reports endpoint correctly aggregates data from PostgreSQL
seed_data_creation: Database seeded with 33 outlets, 121 bookings, 121 transactions, 10+ services
context_for_next_testing_agent: PostgreSQL migration fully tested and verified. All endpoints working: Auth (register, login, me), Outlets CRUD, Services CRUD, Bookings CRUD, Transactions GET, Reports GET, Slot Configs CRUD, Dashboard Configs CRUD. Frontend pages verified: Login, Dashboard, Bookings (121 bookings), Finance (₹72,380 total), Admin Console (Users, Services, Outlets, Slot Booking), Reports, Slot Manager.

auth_register.details: User registration with email, password, name - returns JWT token

auth_login.details: Login with admin@ridn.com/admin123 - returns JWT token and user data

outlets_crud.details: All CRUD operations working - 33 outlets in database

services_crud.details: All CRUD operations working - 10+ services in database

bookings_crud.details: Bookings list and creation working - 121 bookings in database

transactions_get.details: Returns 121 transactions with gross, commission, partner_share

slot_configs_crud.details: Slot configuration with embed tokens working

frontend_login.details: Login page loads, form submission works, redirects to dashboard

frontend_dashboard.details: Dashboard renders with customizable widgets, sidebar navigation working

frontend_bookings.details: Bookings page shows 121 bookings with customer, vehicle, time, status, amount

frontend_finance.details: Finance page shows Total Gross ₹72,380, Commission ₹10,755, Partner Share ₹61,625

frontend_admin_console.details: Admin Console with User Management, Services, Outlets, Slot Booking tabs working

frontend_reports.details: Reports page shows analytics with Total Outlets (33), Bookings (121), Revenue (₹72,380)

frontend_slot_manager.details: Slot Manager shows time slots with bookings, 3 Total Bays, appointment scheduling

mocked_apis.note: All APIs use real PostgreSQL database - no mocked endpoints

database_migration_status.tables_created: 40+ tables including user_auth, customer_users, outlets, services, bookings, transactions, slot_configs, dashboard_configs, ai_conversations, etc.
